news.headline: SP Group A/S started a share buy-back program on 26 August 2024, following announcement no. 12/2024 on 23 August 2024.
news.summary: SP Group launched a share buy-back program on August 26, 2024, as disclosed in their announcement numbered 12/2024 dated August 23, 2024.

news.headline: Arbor Realty Trust announces Q4 & full year 2024 results, declares dividend of $0.43 per share.
Surf Internet raises $175 million in equity, secures $300 million debt facility for Great Lakes network expansion.
news.summary: In Elkhart, Indiana, Surf Internet®, a pioneer in connectivity, marks its 25th anniversary by raising $175 million in new equity funding and securing a $300 million debt facility. This financial boost highlights the company's dedication to providing fiber-optic broadband to underserved areas in the Great Lakes Region. Macquarie Capital led the equity investment, joined by current investors Bain Capital and Post Road Group. The debt facility increase, spearheaded by DigitalBridge Cred, further supports Surf Internet®'s mission.

news.headline: One month into Trump presidency: rapid changes in Washington unsettle business leaders with ongoing volatility.
news.summary: The rapid changes brought on by the president's actions have created challenges for business leaders in Washington, making it difficult for them to navigate the uncertain environment.

news.headline: Coinbase: The SEC is close to dismissing enforcement case.
Pony AI launches robotaxi services in Guangzhou on high-demand routes to Baiyun International Airport and South Railway Station with fares matching standard taxi rates.
news.summary: Pony AI Inc. (NASDAQ:PONY) stock is up in premarket trading as they introduce paid robotaxi services linking Guangzhou’s city center with Baiyun International Airport and South Railway Station. The company is the sole operator on these popular routes. This service provides residents and visitors with a convenient autonomous travel option, bookable through the PonyPilot App at rates aligned with regular Guangzhou taxi fares. James Peng, co-founder and CEO, expressed enthusiasm for this milestone. Check Benzinga.com for the complete story.

news.headline: Financial industry resists strict margin rule for day trading; heavily impacting Wall Street.
Iterative Health to showcase AI advancements at ECCO 2025 with 5 abstracts, focusing on ulcerative colitis trials.
news.summary: Iterative Health, based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, is set to showcase five abstracts at the upcoming European Crohn’s & Colitis Organization (ECCO) meeting scheduled to be held in Berlin, Germany from February 19 to February 22, 2025.

news.headline: Study by ResearchAndMarkets.com on US EV charging at home in 2024 finds focus on user demand/preferences and potential for EV charging load coordination with whole-home energy management.
news.summary: A report titled "EV Charging at Home: User Demand and Preferences" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This study delves into consumer preferences relating to home electric vehicle (EV) charging, including preferred charging locations and equipment, charging habits, user experiences, affordability concerns, space requirements, and future expansion plans. Additionally, it explores the potential for integrating EV charging with smarter whole-home energy management solutions. The report aims to identify opportunities to align EV charging loads with energy-efficient practices.

news.headline: KB Home opens new townhome community in Southwest Las Vegas, aiming to meet high demand.
news.summary: KB Home has revealed the opening of its latest townhome community in Southwest Las Vegas, marking a significant addition in the sought-after area. The new community is set to offer a range of housing options and is part of the company's ongoing commitment to building relationships.

news.headline: KB Home opens 2 new communities in Nampa, Idaho, boosting housing availability in the area.
news.summary: KB Home has recently revealed the launch of two brand-new residential communities in a sought-after spot in Nampa, Idaho. This move is aimed at expanding their presence in the area and attracting potential homeowners.

news.headline: 10 most expensive home listings in US: 5 in coastal Florida, 3 in SoCal, 1 in NYC, 1 in Lake Tahoe. All over $100M, 2 over $200M.
news.summary: In Seattle, a recent report by Redfin revealed that out of the nation's top 10 most expensive home listings, half are located in coastal Florida, three in Southern California, one in New York City, and one in Lake Tahoe. These properties are all listed for over $100 million, with two exceeding $200 million. Despite the luxurious offerings in Florida, residents are dealing with a rise in natural disasters, impacting the housing market's stability. The findings were part of an analysis conducted by Redfin, a technology-driven real estate brokerage traded on NASDAQ under the symbol RDFN.

news.headline: Bitcoin needs to surpass $97K this week to challenge all-time high; analysis suggests potential for significant price increase.
news.summary: Recent analysis has suggested that Bitcoin has the potential to reach new all-time highs if a crucial support level remains intact. This development has caught the attention of investors and analysts, with Bitcoin currently trading at approximately $60,000, inching closer to its previous record of over $64,000. The market sentiment is optimistic, with many anticipating further bullish movements if the support level holds steady. This potential surge in price could lead to increased interest and activity in the cryptocurrency market.

news.headline: FTX rejects claims from 163 countries for payouts including Russia, China, Egypt, Nigeria, Ukraine. Creditor Sunil Kavuri revealed.
news.summary: Sunil Kavuri, a creditor and advocate for FTX, revealed a list of countries including Russia, China, Egypt, Nigeria, and Ukraine.

news.headline: Butterfly Network to attend TD Cowen 45th Annual Health Care Conference on March 3, 2025. VP Heather Getz to present and host investor meetings.
news.summary: In New York and Burlington, Massachusetts, Butterfly Network, Inc. (NYSE: BFLY) revealed plans to participate in the TD Cowen 45th Annual Health Care Conference in Boston on March 3, 2025. The company, known for its handheld, whole-body ultrasound technology and user-friendly software, will have Heather Getz, the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial and Operations Officer, hosting one-on-one investor meetings and delivering a business presentation at the event. This conference will serve as a platform for Butterfly to engage with investors and showcase its innovative healthcare solutions.

news.headline: Spanish Mountain Gold changes symbol to "SPAUF" on OTCQB Venture Market in British Columbia.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, SPA has disclosed a symbol alteration on the OTCQB from SPA.V to SPAUF. This modification pertains to their gold exploration activities, marking a significant transition for the company in the market.

news.headline: CESUR Mining expands cloud mining, serves 9M members, 3.8% of Bitcoin's power, 100 farms, 500k machines, clean energy.
news.summary: CESUR Mining, a global cloud mining leader, is expanding its services to make mining Bitcoin, Litecoin, and Dogecoin easier and more profitable. Since its start in 2018, it has grown to serve over 9 million users worldwide and contributes around 3.8% of Bitcoin's total computing power. With over 100 mining farms and 500,000 high-performance machines, CESUR Mining ensures secure and reliable cloud mining. They use clean energy sources like solar and wind power to keep electricity costs low, offering remote mining contracts for users. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: US dwellers content with current homes despite a low 38% moving rate in 2018. Perception of barrier to move high.
Buford, GA- Dropsy Redhead Designs launches GrabAssure™ makeup grip to aid in application for those in need, with wrist strap.
news.summary: A company based in Buford, Georgia, Dropsy Redhead Designs, revealed on February 21, 2025, the introduction of GrabAssure™, a makeup grip designed to aid individuals with makeup application. The innovative product features a wrist strap to prevent accidental drops.

news.headline: Wiz Khalifa and Makua collaborate with Ozium to release "Clear the Air," challenging cannabis stigma.
news.summary: In a collaboration announced on February 21, 2025, Grammy-nominated rapper Wiz Khalifa and world champion surfer-songwriter Makua Rothman have joined forces with Ozium to release "Clear the Air." This innovative single and music video is aimed at combating cannabis stigma while highlighting their mutual interests.

news.headline: Pantalones Organic Tequila becomes official sponsor of Austin Football Club on Feb 22, 2025. 5th season commences soon.
news.summary: An Austin-based brand, Pantalones Organic Tequila, will begin sponsoring the Austin Football Club on February 22, coinciding with National Margarita Day. This partnership marks Pantalones Organic Tequila as the Official Tequila of the club as it enters its fifth season.

news.headline: French beauty brand VIOLETTE_FR founded by Violette Serrat debuts at Sephora, a major milestone.
news.summary: In a groundbreaking move, VIOLETTE_FR, the diverse beauty brand created by famous makeup artist Violette Serrat, is excited to reveal its launch at Sephora, the renowned beauty retailer. This development signifies a major achievement for the brand as it enters the vast beauty market.

news.headline: Elanco to attend investor conferences on Feb. 27, with CFO Todd Young participating. (Words: 19)
news.summary: Elanco Animal Health Incorporated disclosed on February 21, 2025, that they will be represented at upcoming investor conferences. Todd Young, the company's executive vice president and CFO, will take part in a fireside discussion on Thursday, February 27. Elanco Animal Health is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ELAN.

news.headline: Dubai's Museum of the Future takes part in SXSW with 2050 track sponsorship, pop-up museum, panels, chocolate and cultural events on March 7-11, 2025 in Austin.
news.summary: In March 2025, Austin and Dubai will come together for a five-day event featuring a 2050 track sponsorship, pop-up museum, panels, cultural events, and the debut of the Original Dubai Chocolate. The Museum of the Future (MOTF) from Dubai Future Foundation (DFF) will be at the heart of this collaborative initiative. Taking place in Austin, Texas, this event promises to showcase the innovative spirit and cultural exchange between the two cities. Mark your calendars for March 7-11 to experience this unique convergence of ideas and creativity.

news.headline: LG Electronics is launching a Gaming Portal for LG webOS screens, providing access to various games.
news.summary: LG Electronics (LG) has introduced a Gaming Portal on its webOS platform in Englewood Cliffs, N.J. on Feb. 21, 2025. The portal is designed to provide easy access and personalized discovery of various types of games including AAA, casual, family, and social games. It serves as an All-In-One gaming platform for users, offering convenience and a broad selection of gaming options.

news.headline: PG&E declares $0.025 quarterly stock dividend, payable on April 15, with record date on March 21.
news.summary: In Oakland, California, on February 20, 2025, PG&E Corporation (NYSE: PCG) announced a first quarter 2025 regular cash dividend of $0.025 per share on its common stock. The dividend is set to be paid on April 15, 2025, to shareholders of record as of March.

news.headline: Leidos, Inc. (NYSE:LDOS) completes cash tender offer for all 3.625% Senior Notes Due 2025.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, in Reston, Virginia, Leidos Holdings, Inc. shared news about a recent development. The company's wholly-owned subsidiary, Leidos, Inc., declared an offer to buy back all of its outstanding 3.625% Senior notes for cash through a Tender Offer. This move marks a strategic financial decision by Holdings to potentially streamline its debt obligations and optimize its financial structure. The specifics of the offer, including important numbers like the total amount of notes eligible for repurchase and the timeline for the Tender Offer, were not disclosed in the announcement.

news.headline: Walker Healthforce, a WMBE healthcare technology consulting firm, achieves ISO/IEC 27001 certification on Feb 21, 2025.
news.summary: Today, in Bloomfield Hills, Michigan, Walker Healthforce, a healthcare technology consulting firm owned and operated by women and minorities, celebrated the achievement of receiving ISO/IEC 27001 certification. This prestigious certification signifies the company's dedication to information security, confirming that their systems meet the highest international standards. The successful completion of this certification is a significant milestone that will enhance the firm's reputation and bolster client trust. Walker Healthforce's website (www.walkerhealthforce.com) showcases their commitment to excellence in the field of healthcare technology consulting.

news.headline: Neurocrine Biosciences receives approval from its Board of Directors for a $500 million share repurchase program.
news.summary: Neurocrine Biosciences, Inc., based in San Diego, revealed on Feb. 21, 2025, that its Board of Directors has approved a new share repurchase initiative. The program allows Neurocrine Biosciences to buy back shares worth up to $500 million, contingent on market circumstances.

news.headline: Nota AI partners with Qualcomm AI Hub, NetsPresso® platform optimizes AI models on Qualcomm processors, earns dual 'A' ratings, showcasing strong IPO potential.
news.summary: Nota AI, a leading company based in Seoul, South Korea, recently announced that their on-device generative AI optimization platform, NetsPresso®, now supports AI model optimization on Qualcomm processors through the Qualcomm AI Hub. The platform received dual 'A' ratings in a technical evaluation, indicating promising prospects for an Initial Public Offering (IPO). This news was shared on February 21, 2025, emphasizing the growing significance of AI technology in the industry.

news.headline: Pets Plus Us partners with CFIB, giving discounts on pet insurance policies to 1 million more Canadians.
news.summary: Pets Plus Us, a prominent pet insurance provider catering to cat and dog owners, has disclosed a collaboration that will result in discounts for all policies initiated through this joint effort. This initiative aims to enhance the accessibility of pet insurance throughout the nation. The partnership, announced in Toronto on February 21, 2025, signifies a step towards making pet insurance more affordable for a wider audience.

news.headline: Coreline Soft to showcase AI medical imaging innovation at STR 2025 with AVIEW lineup. HIPAA certification completed.
news.summary: AVIEW, a new product lineup designed for conducting concurrent diagnosis and analysis of thoracic conditions, is set to make its debut at the upcoming HIMSS event on March 3rd. The company behind AVIEW, Coreline Soft, has also recently obtained HIPAA certification. Headquartered in Huntington Beach, Calif., Coreline Soft is partnering with Seoul, South Korea for the launch. The company is eager to showcase its innovative solution, which aims to revolutionize the way thoracic diseases are diagnosed and analyzed. The demonstration of AVIEW at HIMSS will mark a significant milestone for Coreline Soft, highlighting its dedication to advancing healthcare technology.

news.headline: MacPaw launches 'CleanMyEx' campaign to help users declutter after a breakup, coinciding with National Breakup Day.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, in KYIV, Ukraine, the CleanMyMac team from MacPaw introduced the 'CleanMyEx' campaign in conjunction with National Breakup Day. This campaign aims to help Mac users clear digital and physical clutter post-breakup. CleanMyEx presents a solution for individuals looking to declutter their devices and lives during this emotional time.

news.headline: Establishment Labs (NASDAQ: ESTA) to present at Citi’s 2025 Unplugged Medtech and Life Sciences Access Day. CEO and founders to participate in fireside chat.
news.summary: New York-based Establishment Labs Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: ESTA), a global medical technology company focusing on women’s health, especially in breast aesthetics and reconstruction, will be featured in a fireside chat at Citi's 2025 Unplugged Medtech and Life Sciences Access Day. The event will feature key executives Juan José Chacón-Quirós (CEO and Founder), Peter Caldini (President), and Raj Denhoy (CFO). Scheduled for Thursday, the discussion will center on the company's innovations and future plans.

news.headline: Dine Brands Global, Inc. declares $0.51 quarterly dividend on March 4, 2025 for shareholders, record as of March 17, 2025. (Total= $0.51 per share)
news.summary: Dine Brands Global, Inc., the parent company of Applebee's, IHOP, and Fuzzy's Taco Shop, has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.51 per share of common stock, payable on April 4, 2025. The dividend will be distributed to stockholders of record on March 17, 2025. Headquartered in Pasadena, California, Dine Brands Global, Inc. operates under the NYSE ticker symbol DIN.

news.headline: Twilio CEO to join Morgan Stanley Conference on March 4, 2025 at 8:30 a.m. (PT) / 11:30 a.m. (ET). Live webcast available.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Twilio (NYSE: TWLO), a customer engagement platform for top brands, revealed that CEO Khozema Shipchandler will speak at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on March 4, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. (PT) / 11:30 a.m. (ET). The event will feature a live webcast and replay on Twilio’s investor relations site at investors.twilio.com.

news.headline: Black Girls Code and GoldieBlox partner for new season of Code Along Jr., teaching coding skills to youth with free video series on YouTube.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, non-profit organizations Black Girls Code and GoldieBlox have joined forces to empower and educate future tech leaders with their free online coding academy, Code Along. This initiative aims to make coding inclusive and engaging for all by offering video-based coding lessons on platforms like YouTube and social media. The first five episodes of the series are now available for viewers. The latest season of Code Along promises to provide valuable insights and practical coding skills to learners.

news.headline: Energy Vault (NYSE: NRGV) to discuss Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on March 11, 2025 at 4:30 PM ET. Join call at 1-877-704-4453.
news.summary: Energy Vault Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: NRGV), a prominent provider of sustainable grid-scale energy storage solutions, revealed its plan to disclose earnings for Q4 and full year 2024 on March 11, 2025. The announcement will be accompanied by a conference call at 4:30 PM ET. To participate, individuals can dial 1-877-704-4453, while international participants should call 1-201-389-0920 and ask to be connected.

news.headline: Claritev partners with Oracle to offer healthcare cost optimization to Oracle Cloud HCM customers. BenInsights® now available in Oracle Cloud Marketplace.
news.summary: In New York, Claritev Corporation (NYSE: MPLN), previously MultiPlan, a company dedicated to enhancing healthcare affordability, transparency, and fairness, recently revealed that their analytics tool, BenInsights®, has attained Integrated with Oracle Cloud Expertise. This technology is now accessible on the Oracle Cloud Marketplace, providing enhanced benefits to Oracle Cloud users. The BenInsights platform facilitates a more data-driven approach for healthcare.

news.headline: Tiziana Life Sciences partners with Renaissance Lakewood to enhance intranasal foralumab development for various diseases.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, Tiziana Life Sciences, Ltd. (Nasdaq: TLSA) disclosed a partnership with Renaissance Lakewood LLC to improve intranasal foralumab, an anti-CD3 monoclonal antibody for immunomodulation therapy. This agreement involves optimizing the formulation and creating a strategy for scaling up production of foralumab in a nasal device. The aim is to enhance the development of intranasal foralumab, which is being explored as a treatment for neurodegenerative and inflammatory illnesses. The collaboration with Renaissance, a Contract Development and Manufacturing Organization specialized in nasal drug delivery, signifies an important step in advancing this innovative therapy.

news.headline: Unexpected scam trends in the US revealed; $10 billion lost last year alone.
DMG Blockchain Solutions to release Q1 2025 earnings on March 3, 2025 after market close. TSX-V: DMGI, OTCQB: DMGGF, FRANKFURT: 6AX.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 21, 2025, DMG Blockchain Solutions Inc. (TSX-V: DMGI) (OTCQB: DMGGF) (FRANKFURT: 6AX), a company specializing in blockchain and data center technology, is set to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025, concluding on December 31, 2024. The results are scheduled to be disclosed post-market closure on Monday, March 3, 2025.

news.headline: GDEV declares one-time special dividend of $3.31 per share, yielding 20%.
news.summary: Software company GDEV has declared a special cash dividend of $3.31 per share, which is a one-time nonrecurring payment. This amount translates to a noteworthy yield of around 20% for investors.

news.headline: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals (Nasdaq: MDGL) to attend 45th annual TD Cowen Health Care Conference on March 4, 2025 at 11:10 A.M. ET.
news.summary: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals, Inc., based in Conshohocken, Pennsylvania, disclosed that they will be attending the 45th Annual TD Cowen Health Care Conference on March 4, 2025, at 11:10 A.M. Eastern Time. The company's stock is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol MDGL.

news.headline: Vital Farms and CEO Russell Diez-Canseco ranked #2 on Big Path Capital’s MO 100 Top Impact CEO Ranking, up from #3 in 2024.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on February 21, 2025, Big Path Capital recognized Vital Farms (Nasdaq: VITL) and its President & CEO Russell Diez-Canseco as the 2nd position holder on the annual MO 100 Top Impact CEO Ranking. This marks the company's fourth consecutive award, with a notable ascent from the 3rd spot in 2024 to their current rank.

news.headline: MAX Power Mining Corp adds Brent Dunlop to its Board of Directors from Saskatoon, bringing expertise in geology, engineering, and wealth management.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 21, 2025, MAX Power Mining Corp. disclosed the appointment of Mr. Brent Dunlop from Saskatoon, Saskatchewan, to its Board of Directors. The company, trading under CSE: MAXX, OTC: MAXXF, and FRANKFURT: 89N, hailed this addition as a significant enhancement to the board due to Dunlop's profound expertise in geology, engineering, and wealth management.

news.headline: NKGen administers first dose of Troculeucel to FTD patient under FDA program, offering hope to those with limited options.
news.summary: NKGen has made significant progress in developing a potential treatment for frontotemporal dementia ("FTD"), a condition that currently has limited treatment options available. This development marks a crucial advancement in the field of dementia research. FTD is a debilitating neurological disorder that affects approximately 60,000 people in the United States alone. The potential treatment being developed by NKGen offers hope for improving the quality of life for individuals living with FTD and their families. This breakthrough underscores the importance of continued investment in finding effective treatments for neurodegenerative diseases.

news.headline: Firefly Neuroscience exercises warrants, raising $8.8M, extending cash runway to mid-2026; no new warrants issued.
news.summary: The company has extended its cash runway until mid-2026 without issuing any new or replacement warrants. This extension allows the company to operate without the need for additional funding for several years. This strategic move provides financial stability and flexibility, ensuring the company's operations are secure for an extended period. This decision reflects the confidence in the company's ability to sustain itself financially, with no immediate concerns of running out of cash. This development ensures a strong financial position for the company in the medium term, providing a solid foundation for growth and stability.

news.headline: CUSIP requests for new corporate and municipal identifiers declined in January; North American corporate requests totaled 4,505, down 36.9% monthly and 24.2% annually. Municipals fell 14.1% monthly but were up 1.8% annually. International equity CUSIPs dropped 19.5%, while international debt rose 14.0%.引Gerard Faulkner notes uncertainty but expects brisk issuing pace.
news.summary: In January 2025, CUSIP Global Services reported a decrease in the issuance of new corporate and municipal security identifiers. North American corporate CUSIP requests totaled 4,505, a monthly decrease of 36.9%, and a 24.2% decrease from January 2024. U.S. corporate debt identifier requests fell by 32.6%, with short-term and longer-term certificates of deposit also declining. Municipal identifier requests dropped by 14.1% from December, but saw a 1.8% year-over-year increase. Texas led municipal requests with 78, followed by California and New York with 59 each. International equity CUSIP requests decreased by 19.5%, while international debt requests rose by 14.0% in January. Year-to-date through January 2025, long-term municipal notes saw a substantial increase of 362.5% compared to the same period in 2024. Gerard Faulkner, Director of Operations for CGS, noted that while monthly request volumes have slowed, most major asset classes are performing better than year-ago levels, indicating a potentially active market ahead.

news.headline: First Bancshares, Inc. declares $0.40 annual cash dividend per share, payable on April 15, 2025, to shareholders as of April 1.
news.summary: Mountain Grove, Missouri - On February 21, 2025, First Bancshares, Inc. (OTCQX: FBSI), the parent company of Stockmens Bank based in Colorado Springs, disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved an annual cash dividend of $0.40 per share on the corporation's common stock. Shareholders of record as of April 1, 2025, will receive the dividend, which is scheduled for payment on April 15, 2025.
